name: Fructose Chocolate Cake#1
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the fructose and margarine until smooth.
2. Add vanilla, milk, and eggs; mix until creamy.
3. Gradually add remaining ingredients.
4. Beat for 2 minutes on medium speed.
5. Pour batter into a greased and floured 8-inch or 9-inch cake pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 40-45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. One serving equals approximately 213 calories or 2 1/4 Bread + 1 fat exchange. (1/12 of the cake)
8. Frost with Fudgy Fructose Frosting.
